## 1. Executive Summary
- Current focus is on operational maintenance regarding the Certificate renewal (Expires 4/5) process initiated on 03-25.
- The task is currently stalled due to external communication delays.

## 2. Pending & Risks
- **(Urgent)** Certificate renewal (Expires 4/5): No response received after two follow-up attempts directed to external stakeholders. Potential risk of service interruption if not resolved by the expiration date.

## 3. Management Gap
- Bottleneck identified with David Kim (External). Lack of responsiveness to Minjun Lee (Internal) regarding the Certificate renewal (Expires 4/5) creates a critical path delay that threatens the 04-05 deadline.

## 4. Strategic Insights
- Security compliance tasks involving external entities require an earlier buffer period or a defined escalation path to mitigate risks of non-responsiveness near expiration dates.
